headlines.title_cn: AI researchers continue to leave Google for its rivals
headlines.title_en: AI researchers continue to leave Google for its rivals
headlines.summary_cn: Top AI researchers Jonas Adler and Alexander Pritzel are leaving Google for Anthropic, following departures from top scientists Noam Shazeer and John Jumper.
headlines.summary_en: Top AI researchers Jonas Adler and Alexander Pritzel are leaving Google for Anthropic, following departures from top scientists Noam Shazeer and John Jumper.

headlines.title_cn: The memory chip crunch is paying off for this U.S. company
headlines.title_en: The memory chip crunch is paying off for this U.S. company
headlines.summary_cn: Revenue quadrupled to $41.45 billion compared with the same period a year ago. The company's profit, meanwhile, rose from $1.88 billion to an incredible $28.2 billion year-over-year.
headlines.summary_en: Revenue quadrupled to $41.45 billion compared with the same period a year ago. The company's profit, meanwhile, rose from $1.88 billion to an incredible $28.2 billion year-over-year.

headlines.title_cn: OpenAI unveils its first custom chip, built by Broadcom
headlines.title_en: OpenAI unveils its first custom chip, built by Broadcom

headlines.title_cn: Thomann takes legal action against Fender
headlines.title_en: Thomann takes legal action against Fender

headlines.title_cn: Companies are scrambling to stop employees from maxing out AI budgets with small tasks
headlines.title_en: Companies are scrambling to stop employees from maxing out AI budgets with small tasks
headlines.summary_cn: The tokenmaxxing era was brief. We now appear to be entering the era of token rationing.
headlines.summary_en: The tokenmaxxing era was brief. We now appear to be entering the era of token rationing.

items.title_cn: Facebook rolls out an AI companion app for creators
items.title_en: Facebook rolls out an AI companion app for creators
items.summary_cn: The new app, which is currently being tested with select creators, will have Facebook's recently launched AI creator assistant built into it.
items.summary_en: The new app, which is currently being tested with select creators, will have Facebook's recently launched AI creator assistant built into it.

items.title_cn: Boffin claims Microsoft’s “quantum leap” is invalid due to “basic Python errors”
items.title_en: Boffin claims Microsoft’s “quantum leap” is invalid due to “basic Python errors”

items.title_cn: Agility Robotics plans to go public via SPAC in a $2.5B deal
items.title_en: Agility Robotics plans to go public via SPAC in a $2.5B deal
items.summary_cn: Agility Robotics, the humanoid robotics startup that spun out of Oregon State University in 2015, expects to generate $620 million in proceeds.
items.summary_en: Agility Robotics, the humanoid robotics startup that spun out of Oregon State University in 2015, expects to generate $620 million in proceeds.

items.title_cn: Figma adds code layers, support for animations, more AI features in new update
items.title_en: Figma adds code layers, support for animations, more AI features in new update
items.summary_cn: Figma's update adds a new code layer, support for motion and shaders, and the ability to create custom plug-ins for various tasks using AI.
items.summary_en: Figma's update adds a new code layer, support for motion and shaders, and the ability to create custom plug-ins for various tasks using AI.
